case_title: JOHANNA DUNNING et al VS. EAGLE'S TOWING & RECOVERY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EAGLE'S TOWING & RECOVERY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLE'S TOWING & RECOVERY HEARING SET FOR MAR-22-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-15-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLE'S TOWING & RECOVERY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $860.00 FILED BY DUNNING, JOHANNA LIFF, TOMIKO AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLE'S TOWING & RECOVERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNNING, JOHANNA LIFF, TOMIKO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EAGLE'S TOWING & RECOVERY $860.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $920.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $430- AND 1/2 OF THE COSTS TO EACH PLAINTIFF (JOHANNA DUNNING AND TOMIKO LIFF) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLE'S TOWING & RECOVERY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY DUNNING, JOHANNA LIFF, TOMIKO EAGLE'S TOWING & RECOVERY
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF DUNNING, JOHANNA LIFF, TOMIKO ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DUNNING, JOHANNA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
